description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular double-sided head made of gray metal. The head features a central spike on top and symmetrical, blocky striking faces on either side, giving it a formidable and industrial appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and wood, with visible metallic bands reinforcing its structure. The lower end of the handle is fitted with a circular metal ring, possibly for hanging or securing the hammer. The surface of the head shows a matte, slightly rough finish, while the handle displays a weathered, textured look with some metallic and wooden elements. This hammer is designed for heavy impact tasks, likely used in demolition or construction scenarios.
description: A large, double-sided sledgehammer with a spiked metal head and a reinforced, textured handle ending in a metal ring. The hammer has a rugged, industrial look with visible metallic and wooden elements.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the front, showcasing the wide, blocky double-sided head with a central spike and the full length of the reinforced handle.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammer's head and the cylindrical handle, highlighting the thickness and symmetry of the striking faces.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this view displays the broad face of the hammer's head, the central spike, and the detailed handle with its metallic bands and ring.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, showing the slim profile of the head and the straight, reinforced handle with its circular end ring.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle made of wood and metal, reinforced with metallic bands and ending in a circular metal ring; the surface appears textured and weathered for grip.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledgehammer head with a central spike on top, blocky rectangular striking faces on both sides, and a robust, industrial design.
